M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
 
Main - Class in Unnamed Package
Program entry point
Main() - Constructor for class Main
 
makeMove(Board, Scanner) - Method in class game.Player
Prompts this player to enter a move, then attempts to execute it.
move(Position) - Method in class piece.Piece
Moves the piece to the given position.
movePiece(Position, Position, Color) - Method in class board.Board
Attempts to move a piece from 'from' to 'to' for the given player color.
